prevention: Maintain current irrigation and fertilization practices.

treatment: Apply Carbendazim 50% WP (2.0g/L) for general fungal control.
Spray Propiconazole 25% EC (1.0ml/L) if visible rust or spots persist.
Isolate or remove severely affected plants immediately.
Ensure proper soil drainage to reduce pathogen moisture.
prevention: Ensure adequate spacing between plants for airflow.
Use disease-resistant sugarcane varieties in future plantings.
Avoid overhead irrigation which can spread pathogens.

treatment: Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL (0.3ml/L) for sucking pests.
Apply Chlorantraniliprole 18.5% SC (0.4ml/L) if borer activity is suspected.
Consider biological pest control methods like Trichogramma parasites.
Targeted spray only on affected patches to preserve beneficial insects.
prevention: Monitor surrounding plants regularly for early signs of infestation.
Clear debris and weeds around the field where pests might breed.
